intro: Hyalosperma stoveae, also known as Stove's Everlasting or Blue Everlasting, is a perennial shrubby plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
